queries.question: Which fiction books have a rating of 2.5 and which non-fiction books have the same rating?
queries.sql:
SELECT Books.Title 
FROM Books
WHERE (Books.Literature = "Fiction Book" OR Books.Literature = "Non-fiction Book") AND Books.Rating = 2.5
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?books a :Books .
  ?books p:Title ?title .
  ?books p:Literature ?literature_w .
  ?books p:Literature ?literature_w2 .
  ?books p:Rating ?rating_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?literature_w) = "Fiction Book" || STR(?literature_w2) = "Non-fiction Book")) && (STR(?rating_w) = "2.5")))
}

queries.question: Show fiction books and non-fiction books with a rating of 2.5.
queries.sql:
SELECT Books.Title 
FROM Books
WHERE Books.Literature = "Fiction Book" OR Books.Literature = "Non-fiction Book" AND Books.Rating = 2.5
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?books a :Books .
  ?books p:Title ?title .
  ?books p:Literature ?literature_w .
  ?books p:Literature ?literature_w2 .
  ?books p:Rating ?rating_w .
  FILTER((STR(?literature_w) = "Fiction Book" || (STR(?literature_w2) = "Non-fiction Book" && (STR(?rating_w) = "2.5"))))
}
